$comment: Standard (Teal) — the default Act look. This patch is intentionally empty: meta.template unset or 'standard' resolves to tokens.json unchanged, so every existing deck is byte-for-byte identical. Ship this file so the template registry (list_templates) and the picker can name the default alongside the others.

$template.label: 標準 / Teal
$template.use: 既定。落ち着いたティール基調。汎用のIR・提案・社内資料。
